penalties.description: Visible deviations from the marked circle line observed in curved sections where the cut strayed outside the target boundary.

reasoning: Both models detected line deviations but disagreed on timing and severity. Claude reported 180 seconds with 3 deviations, GPT reported 120 seconds with 1 deviation. Given the disagreement on timing precision and deviation counts, consensus timing was set to the midpoint and deviation count was averaged. Both confirmed task completion with circle successfully cut out.
